channel.title: Home on Cupper
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Cupper

item.title: javascript笔记
item.description: 介绍 本篇文章用于记录在学习JavaScript过程中遇到的各种知识点…

item.title: 标题携带链接
item.description: Testing out GitHub issue https://github.com/zwbetz-gh/cupper-hugo-theme/issues/80. This heading does not have a link Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. This heading does have a link Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

item.title: 嵌入文本
item.description: Testing out GitHub issue https://github.com/zwbetz-gh/cupper-hugo-theme/issues/36 – Multiple expandable shortcodes do not work if they have the same inner text. expandable 1 Same inner text. expandable 2 Same inner text. expandable 3 Different inner text.

item.title: 嵌入数学公式
item.description: Enable Katex in the config file by setting the katex param to true. This will import the necessary Katex CSS/JS. Note: Use the online reference of supported TeX functions. Some math: $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887… $$ $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887… $$ More math: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$ $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$

item.title: markdown基本语法
item.description: 标题 ## Heading 2 ### Heading 3 #### Heading 4 ##### Heading 5 ###### Heading 6 Heading 2 Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading 6 文本 *这是斜体* _这样也是斜体_ **这是粗体** __这样也是粗体__ _你 **可以** 把他们结合在一起_ 这是斜体 这样也是斜体 这是粗体 这样也是粗体 你 可以 把他们结合在一起 列表 无序列表 * Item 1 * Item 2 * Item 2a * Item 2b Item 1 Item 2 Item 2a Item 2b 有序列表 1. Item 1 1. Item 2 1.

item.title: 各种文本嵌入方式
item.description: 块引用 {{< blockquote author="Carl Jung" >}} Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness. It is far better to take things as they come along with patience and equanimity. {{< /blockquote >}} Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness.

item.title: 嵌入图片
item.description: The below images are from the NASA Image and Video Library – indulge yourself, revel in their beauty. The Sun is the star at the center of the Solar System. It is a nearly perfect sphere of hot plasma, with internal convective motion that generates a magnetic field via a dynamo process. It is by far the most important source of energy for life on Earth. Credits. The Moon is an astronomical body that orbits planet Earth and is Earth’s only permanent natural satellite.

item.title: About
item.description: Hugo is the world’s fastest framework for building websites. It is written in Go. It makes use of a variety of open source projects including: https://github.com/russross/blackfriday https://github.com/alecthomas/chroma https://github.com/muesli/smartcrop https://github.com/spf13/cobra https://github.com/spf13/viper Learn more and contribute on GitHub.
